chunks.text: The EECS Undergraduate Newsletter for February 2, 2024 provides updates for electrical engineering and computer science students at UC Berkeley. This edition includes important announcements about academic deadlines, upcoming events, and opportunities for undergraduates. Students should review the newsletter regularly to stay informed about department news and resources available to support their studies and career development in EECS fields.

Key topics covered in this newsletter include registration information for spring courses, research opportunities with faculty, and internship deadlines. The department highlights workshops on technical skills and career preparation sessions. Students are encouraged to participate in department events to network with peers and industry professionals, enhancing their academic and professional growth in electrical engineering and computer science.
